templates.name: Can I switch my test results to same day after I order?
templates.content:
We offer an upgrade to a Snap FastTrack return for $39. This comes with a FedEx Overnight return label for the return of your sample. FastTrack upgrades also include expedited lab work and results are delivered by 8:59 p.m. Pacific Time, the same day your sample arrives at the SneakPeek Lab.
 
You'll have an opportunity to upgrade to FastTrack after you receive your test kit, during the online barcode activation step.

templates.name: How long does my sample stay stable after collection? How long can it stay stable during shipping?
templates.content: Your DNA blood sample can stay stable for a month in the test tube, due to a preservative that was included in the tube.

templates.name: Does a previous miscarriage affect my pregnancy test results?
templates.content: Research indicates that fetal DNA is quickly eliminated from a mother's bloodstream, typically within 1-2 days. As a result, a previous miscarriage would not impact the results of your present test. Let me know if you have any other questions.

templates.name: Store location/retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://sneakpeektest.com/where-to-buy-at-home-baby-gender-test/

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: Standard test kits ship from our office in La Jolla, California. FastTrack tests ship with Amazon as a third-party shipper and these tests are expedited from whichever stocked Amazon center is closest to your delivery address.

templates.name: Do I need to fill up the container? / How much sample is enough?
templates.content: We don't need the full amount to process a successful sample. Usually, somewhere around the halfway mark is plenty. If you need any extra support, please feel free to contact the SneakPeek Customer Care team by email here: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/XVewz_QO

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: My test result was inaccurate/wrong!
templates.content: I'm so sorry to hear that! The best way to handle this is to email us directly here - https://sneakpeektest.com/contact-us/ We provide a refund for incorrect results post-birth when presented with a state-certified birth certificate. Our team will be happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/sneakpeektest/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/sneakpeektest

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://sneakpeektest.com/referral-registration/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://sneakpeektest.com/sneakpeek-brand-affiliates/

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Our team works quickly, so most orders are unable to be edited once the order has been submitted, but I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can schedule a call back with our Customer Care team at https://sneakpeektest.com/contact-us . Or, I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you?

templates.name: Are the results still accurate even if I tested 6 weeks into the preganancy?
templates.content: We're constantly working on improving the sensitivity and accuracy of our test. We recently completed a 4-month long clinical trial with a new improved test process. In this study, 113 women provided DNA samples at 6 weeks and 8 weeks into pregnancy. We also surveyed the women after their anatomy ultrasounds. All fetal sex predictions at all timepoints matched, which means our SneakPeek test can be taken at 6 weeks into pregnancy as measured by either LMP or estimated due date with confidence. The SneakPeek test is the same whether your blood sample is taken through SneakPeek Clinical or collected using Lancet or Snap. All methods are fine for use at 6 weeks, with 99.9% accuracy!

templates.name: Minimum age for the Early DNA Traits Test
templates.content: For the traits test, there's no minimum age - you can use the traits test kit as soon as the child is born. The target age for Traits use is 0-3 years.

templates.name: Why am I not getting $20 off the standard kit?/Your ad states it's up to $20 off, why don't I see it applied on my cart?
templates.content: My apologies for the confusion! That ad states "Get up to $20", this means that the Standard Kit is $10 off and the FastTrack Kit is $20 off. I hope this clarifies things.

templates.name: I would like to edit my email for my results.
templates.content: The email address you provided at checkout is to receive the order confirmation and tracking info and won't be the email address that gender results will be sent to. That email address can be designated during the kit activation process.

templates.name: What is SneakPeek guarantee?
templates.content: We're the most accurate early gender DNA test on the market, and we fully stand behind our results. If the gender of your newborn doesn't match your test result, you'll receive a full refund. Find out more about our baby gender test accuracy here: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/6jGlqYoB

templates.name: What is the Gender Test?
templates.content: Our Gender Test is a DNA test that looks for male chromosomes in the cell-free fetal DNA (cffDNA) found in mom's blood, a process that was first established in 1997 and refined in a multitude of scientific publications since. Urine-based tests have no scientific validity, as there are no gender markers in urine. You can check this article out for more info: https://sneakpeektest.com/blog/urine-vs-dna-based-gender-predictor-tests/?utm_campaign=concierge&utm_medium=text&utm_source=attentive&externalId=iB7vN

templates.name: Will i get results over the weekend?
templates.content: Our lab receives samples Monday-Saturday except for postal holidays. FastTrack kits are reported the same day they arrive but have an 8:59 PST deadline. Our Standard Kits are reported the next day including Saturdays and Sundays.

templates.name: I just gave birth to a boy recently, will this affect my results?
templates.content: Clinical studies  https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0002929707616759 have shown that fetal DNA is undetectable in mom's bloodstream between 1 to 2 days after birth. Therefore, a previous male-bearing pregnancy won't affect your current test results.

templates.name: Retroactive discounts
templates.content: To get this sorted out much quicker, please submit a request via the contact us form: https://sneakpeektest.com/contact-us-form/ One of our reps will get back in touch asap!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://sneakpeektest.com/return-policy/

templates.name: Can I take the test? When can I take the test?
templates.content: Our Gender Test can be used any time starting at 6 weeks into pregnancy until birth. Feel free to use our Test Eligibility Calculator to determine whether or not you can use the test now: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/o6p4DFlA

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link https://sneakpeektest.com/contact-us-form/ Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: For domestic orders, you can find detailed shipping info here: https://sneakpeektest.com/shipping/ For Canadian and UK orders, shipping takes 1-2 business days, and for Australia, it takes 1-4 business days.

templates.name: Can I buy the SneakPeak test now and use it later?
templates.content: Yes, you can! While moms have to be at least 6 weeks into pregnancy to use the test, the kit is good for 6 months to a year, with an expiration date listed at the bottom of every box. Just leave the plastic wrap on, and only open the kit when you're ready to take the test.

templates.name: What to know before taking the SneakPeek test / returning the sample
templates.content: It's important that no males are present or have any contact with the contents of the test box before, during, and after sample collection (once blood sample is secured and sealed in the return shipping envelope, it can be handled by anyone). Wash hands thoroughly with soap and warm water before opening or handling any of the test box and its contents. We recommend you rewash your hands thoroughly again prior to actually taking the test. Read through all instructions and make sure to follow them thoroughly, then collect the sample preferably on a kitchen or dining room table area. Bathroom counter tops aren't recommended. Clean the table surface with warm soapy water or a household cleaner before collecting your sample. Make sure to activate your kit barcode (found on the inside top flap of your test kit) before shipping your sample and don't forget to take a picture of your Tracking Label before mailing so that you can track your sample on its way back to us. Only use the prepaid return shipping we supply to return your sample.

templates.name: When will I receive the results?
templates.content: Gender results are sent straight to the "results email address" provided during kit activation. If you used SneakPeek Standard, it will be sent between by 2pm Pacific Time the day after receiving your "Sample Arrived" email. If you used FastTrack, it will be sent by 8:59pm Pacific Time the same day your "Sample Arrived" email is received.

templates.name: Do you take FSA payments?
templates.content: SneakPeek is not reimbursable through FSA or HSA at this time.

templates.name: Delivery delay - if customer has tracking number
templates.content: We understand your frustration! Our apologies on behalf of our shipping carrier for the unexpected delay. If the tracking shows no movement after another day, please contact our Customer Care team to further assist: https://sneakpeektest.com/contact-us-form/

templates.name: I sent in my sample and haven't received my results yet? / Sample delays -  If customer has tracking number, and still in transit
templates.content: Thank you for your patience! Your return tracking will give you the most up-to-date estimate of your sample's delivery at SneakPeek lab. If the tracking shows no movement after another day, please reach back out to us!

templates.name: Do you ship in discrete packaging?
templates.content: Yes! Our tests are shipped in a plain padded envelope with our shipping label on top. The shipping label will show "SneakPeek" in the return address. Inside the packaging, the product box will be the same as the images shown here: https://sneakpeektest.com/early-at-home-baby-gender-blood-test/

templates.name: I'm having twins. Can SneakPeak determine the gender of each one?
templates.content: We look for male DNA in the fetal DNA found in the mom's blood sample, and in the case of twins, you'll still receive only one result. In the case of identical twins, if male DNA is found, you'll receive a 'male' result, and both babies are male. If no male DNA is found, you'll receive a 'female' result, and both babies are female. For fraternal twins, finding male DNA means at least one baby is male, but can't distinguish if the second is male or female.

templates.name: Can I have the results sent to someone else?
templates.content: Yes! When you receive your test kit, you'll activate the kit online using a unique barcode found on the kit. On this kit activation page -https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/GHLIxCDu you'll be able to provide both your email address as well as a ""Results"" email address, and we'll send the gender results to the ""Results"" address.

templates.name: Can male DNA contaminate my sample or cause inaccurate results?
templates.content: Our test is extremely accurate, but also extremely sensitive. If you take the necessary steps to avoid contamination, such as sterilizing surfaces, thoroughly washing your hands, and collecting the sample yourself or having a female collect the sample for you, you'll greatly reduce the risk of male DNA contamination.  You can also check out this blog post about sample contamination: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/QV8uYJSS

templates.name: I like to visit one of your locations to do the test!
templates.content: If you're interested in this service, please use this link to access our store locator where you can search for the closest ultrasound studio near you: https://sneakpeektest.com/early-clinical-baby-gender-blood-test/#findLocationContainer Please contact them directly to schedule your appointment! We completely understand how important this time of your life is and we want you to feel supported.

templates.name: Return portal
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/l3485sq1

templates.name: Did you receive my sample? - ESCALATE
templates.content: Thanks for your patience! If your tracking shows that your sample was delivered today, you'll be receiving an email once our team has checked it in for processing. If your ""Sample Arrived"" email doesn't arrive by 4pm Pacific Time, please reach back out to us!

templates.name: I purchased at Wallmart. Do I need to purchase the Lab Fee from your website?
templates.content: In-store purchased kits are a 2-part process. The store-purchased kit is $30 to purchase, and you do have to purchase the $69 lab fee upon activation and before results.

templates.name: My sample tube filled up quickly. Will that be an issue?
templates.content: If your sample is above the upper fill line, it's not a problem! Just be sure to follow the """"Mix bood with preservative"""" thoroughly so your sample is preserved well. If for any reason our lab receives your sample and we're unable to determine results, we'll contact you for a free retest!

templates.name: Delivery delay - if no tracking number
templates.content: We understand your frustration! Your shipping confirmation email includes a tracking number for your order - you can track your order directly with the shipping carrier to see the most up-to-date estimate of your order's delivery.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email our Clinical Support team at clinicalsupport@gatewaygenomics.org. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: I sent in my sample and haven't received my results yet? / Sample delays -  If customer has tracking number, and shows Delivered
templates.content: Thanks for your patience! If your tracking shows that your sample was delivered today, you'll be receiving an email once our team has checked it in for processing. If your ""Sample Arrived"" email doesn't arrive by 4pm Pacific Time, please reach back out to us!

templates.name: I sent in my sample and haven't received my results yet? / Sample delays -  ESCALATE
templates.content: I'll have my team look into this further for you. Could you please provide your 8-digit test barcode, and your sample's return tracking number?

templates.name: Can I send the test back on the next day?
templates.content: Yes, just store it in a dark area at room temperature. There is a solution in SneakPeek vials that keeps samples test ready for 30 days. It will be fine if sent the following day.

templates.name: My blood was taken at a participating location. What is the status of my results?
templates.content: The studio or clinic you visited has tracking information for your blood sample's return to SneakPeek Labs. We apologize, but SneakPeek does not have access to this information. Please get in touch with the participating location directly regarding the status of your sample or results.

templates.name: My sample had a blood clot. Will that affect the results
templates.content: Most tests with some clotting are still able to be successfully processed. If we can't determine the results when your sample arrives at the SneakPeek Lab, we'll reach out by email to provide you with a complimentary retest.

templates.name: Is shipping free when I send my sample?
templates.content: Shipping is always free, both to you and to send your sample back to SneakPeek Labs for SneakPeek At-Home Gender and SneakPeek Fetal Doppler products. Hope this helps!

templates.name: Why would a sample be inconclusive?
templates.content: First, we assure you this doesn't mean anything is wrong! We may just need a second look. When we send an inconclusive sample update email, it's because our team wasn't able to pull enough total DNA from your first vial to tell. We always have two SneakPeek lab technicians process samples, so we'll only ask for a retest if we're 100% sure the first vial didn't yield enough total DNA info to tell one way or the other. You can read more about it here: https://sneakpeektest.com/faqs/

templates.name: What if my sample is inconclusive?
templates.content:
We've got you! Because inconclusive results can happen with any type of lab testing, we'll set you up with a retest kit completely on us if this happens. Retest kits are always sent with the same collection and shipping method as your initial test and we'll always make sure your new sample gets same day priority processing, with results in your preferred email inbox by 8pm PST/11pm EST the day of delivery to the SneakPeek Lab.

We'll let you know in your sample update email when a retest kit is scheduled to ship. If you prefer not to retest, that's alright! Please just send us an "Inconclusive Refund" request email by 1pm PST/4pm EST the day of your shipment. If we aren't able to locate your order for the new package, we'll reach out to touch base with you for a shipment the next business day.

templates.name: Can I do a venous sample instead of a capillary sample?
templates.content:
Our at-home kits come sterile so we don't recommend using components outside of the box. Our accuracy studies are based on the step-by-step instructions in our booklet and we see an uptick in results issues when the steps in our booklet aren't followed closely, even when the test is performed alongside a doctor or in a medical setting.

If you're only able to collect a small sample with the components in the box, please still send it in! Our lab provides one free retest kit if lab work cannot be finalized on the first try. If your order requires a retest, our team would reach out to help.
